product_name: Toy Story Buzz Lightyear Feature Plush with Projector Light

bullets: Press chest to activate starry projector light and bedtime music
Features 20+ phrases teaching space and encouraging learning play
Supports imaginative play, curiosity and early development
Soft, cuddly plush perfect for comfort and bedtime routines
Part of the Disney Hooyay range – inspiring learning through play
content.keywords: buzz lightyear plush, toy story toy, interactive plush toy, toddler night light toy, projector plush toy, talking toy buzz, educational toy toddler, baby soft toy
content.description: To infinity and beyond! The Toy Story Buzz Lightyear Feature Plush brings learning, play and comfort together in one interactive companion. Press Buzz’s chest to activate a starry projector light that fills the room with a calming glow, perfect for bedtime, along with gentle music to help little ones relax. With over 20 fun phrases, Buzz introduces children to space while encouraging curiosity and imaginative play. Designed for toddlers, this super soft plush is perfect for cuddles, quiet time and everyday adventures. Part of the Disney Hooyay Learn & Play range, it’s a fun and engaging way to support early learning – bringing big fun for little ones.
